---
title: "Simple Pythagorean Model"
author: "Gabriel Diniz"
date: "2026-06-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/Users/goosecatenterprises/Desktop/Goosecat/Pythagorean Model/Prediction Model")
```


```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(knitr)

```


```{r}

x_pyth      <- 1.24   #Clive Beggs coefficients
total_games <- 30    # full season length, used by the projection step below — adjust as needed

team_stats <- read.csv("NWSLBreakTable.csv")

team_stats <- team_stats %>%
  mutate(
    ExpPointsPct = GF^x_pyth / (GF^x_pyth + GA^x_pyth),
    ExpPoints    = round(2.78 * ExpPointsPct * Matches, 1),
    PointsDiff   = round(ExpPoints - Points, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(PointsDiff))

r2 <- cor(team_stats$Points, team_stats$ExpPoints)^2
cat(sprintf("R-squared (actual vs. expected points): %.3f\n\n", r2))

print(team_stats)

# ---- 4. Plot: actual vs. expected points ----

 
plt <- ggplot(team_stats, aes(x = ExpPoints, y = Points, label = Team)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2.5) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, color = "gray30", max.overlaps = Inf) +
  labs(
    title = "NWSL: Actual vs. Expected Points",
    x = "Expected Points (Pythagorean)",
    y = "Actual Points"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
 
print(plt)   # displays the plot in your session (e.g. RStudio's Plots pane)
ggsave("actual_vs_expected_points.png", plt, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 120)


# ---- 5. Project final standings (optional — for an in-progress season) ----
# Uses each team's current per-game GF/GA rate, scaled to total_games.
# Each team's own Matches count is used, so uneven games played is
# already handled correctly.
project_standings <- function(team_stats, total_games, x_pyth) {
  team_stats %>%
    mutate(
      GF_per_game    = GF / Matches,
      GA_per_game    = GA / Matches,
      Proj_GF        = GF_per_game * total_games,
      Proj_GA        = GA_per_game * total_games,
      Proj_PointsPct = Proj_GF^x_pyth / (Proj_GF^x_pyth + Proj_GA^x_pyth),
      ProjPoints     = round(Proj_PointsPct * 3 * total_games, 1),
      GamesRemaining = total_games - Matches
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(ProjPoints)) %>%
    select(Team, Matches, GamesRemaining, Points, ProjPoints)
}


# Example usage (uncomment to run):
 project_standings(team_stats, total_games, x_pyth) %>% as_tibble() %>% print(n = Inf)
 
 colnames(team_stats)
 pythag_simple <- subset(team_stats, select = -c(GF, GA, GF.per.match, GA.per.match, X, ExpPointsPct))
 pythag_simple <- rename(pythag_simple, Hudl_xPoints = Expected.Points, Hudl_Diff = xPoints.Points, Pythag_xPoints = ExpPoints,
                         Pythag_Diff = PointsDiff)
 
 kable(pythag_simple)


```
